title: SONGMICS Kitchen Bin, 3 x 18 L Recycling Bin, 3 Compartment Rubbish Bin for Recycling and Waste, 15 Liners Included, Soft-Close Lids, Pedals, Inner Buckets, Steel, Ink Black LTB54BK
features: Waste sorting made easy: With this bin with three 18 litre compartments, you can store your rubbish, e.g. Packaging waste, organic waste and residual waste, easy sorting.
Rust Resistant: The kitchen trash can is made of steel and is rust resistant. Simply wipe the surface of the pedal bin for cleaning.
Softclose Lid: The lids of the kitchen bin close slowly, quietly and gently and do not fall off with a loud bang to prevent unpleasant noise.
Modern design: Clear lines, elegant black colour – This waste separation system looks modern and fits perfectly with other furniture and household appliances.

Easy to open and empty: Simply step on the pedal to open the lid of this waste bin without touching the bin with your hand. The inner buckets can be easily lifted out and emptied thanks to the metal handle.
description: Product Description Quality Steel Rust-resistant and easy to clean PP Plastic Inner Buckets Tough, strong, and hard to break ABS Plastic Lids With a matte finish that’s also easy to clean Inner Buckets You can lift the inner bucket out with the metal handle to easily empty or clean it. Side Handles The handles on the sides help you easily move the rubbish bin when needed. Step Pedals Simply step on the pedal to open the lid, so you don’t have to bend over or touch the lid.
